calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Receipts
Off Calendar Mar-07-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kelly Dixon, via Zoom, for and with Grace Mauberret, Beneficiary; David Millstein, via Zoom, for and with Raymond Mauberret, Co-Trustee.

Upon query by the court regarding the $20k reserve, Mr. Millstein reports on that the parties have reached a settlement of all issues relating to the Grace Mauberret 2009 Irrevocable Special Needs Trust and other related matters. Ms. Dixon reports that the reserve has been distributed by Raymond Mauberret. The court confirms with counsel that this matter can be taken off calendar.

The subject matter is taken off calendar in open court.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Receipts
Off Calendar Sep-06-2022 Continued To Mar-07-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lizabeth de Vries appeared by zoom for Grace Mauberret.
Laura Dang and David Millstein appeared by zoom for Raymond Mauberret and Regina Mauberret (co-trustees).

The court questions why there are no receipts for all of the funds that have been distributed. Ms. Dang stated that the majority of the assets have been distributed including the property and the cash, and that the remaining assets can be distributed at the end of the year/Jan. 2023 when the tax return for 2022 can be filed and all of the tax liabilities can be paid as well as the administration fees. Ms. Dang also stated that this information was provided in the declaration that was filed as well as the status report. Ms. de Vries stated that her client has no objection to the request for a $20,000.00 reserve. Ms. Dang stated that all is accounted for except for the $20,000.00. Status on filing of receipts on distribution is continued to March 7, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If proof that all of the funds have been distributed is filed one week prior to the hearing, no appearance is required on that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition For Termination Of Irrevocable Special Needs Trust; Payment Of Liens; Distribution Of Trust Assets To Beneficiary; And Discharge Of Co-Truste
Off Calendar Apr-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lizabeth De Vries, via Zoom, for Grace Mauberret, via Zoom, Petitioner; David Millstein, via Zoom, for Raymond Mauberret, via Zoom, Co-Trustee.

The court advises counsel that it has reviewed the additional filings in support of the instant petition, and it is inclined to grant the petition. Ms. De Vries offers additional oral testimony in support of her petition and submits. Mr. Millstein submits.

The Petition for Termination of Irrevocable Special Needs Trust, etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

Petition For Termination Of Irrevocable Special Needs Trust; Payment Of Liens; Distribution Of Trust Assets To Beneficiary; And Discharge Of Co-Truste
Off Calendar Mar-08-2022 Continued To Apr-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Termination Of Irrevocable Special Needs Trust; Payment Of Liens; Distribution Of Trust Assets To Beneficiary; And Discharge Of Co-Truste
Off Calendar Jan-18-2022 Continued To Mar-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lizabeth DeVries, via ZOOM, for Grace Mauberret, via ZOOM, Petitioner; David Millstein, via ZOOM, for Raymond Mauberret, Respondent; Richard Schindler, via ZOOM, interested Party.

The court and counsel discuss the matter and the court advises that it is not ready to grant the petition at this time but will allow a continuance for the submission supporting documents. No objection to the court's suggestion is presented.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Termination of Irrevocable Special Needs Trust, etc., is continued to Mar-08-2022 at 98:00 am in Dept. 204. The parties are instructed to file documents related to the next calling of this matter by Feb-22-2022.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Neves. Not reported.
